# infinity_user_group

Manages a user group configuration with the Infinity service. User groups allow organizing users for management and permission purposes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_user_group" "example" {
  name        = "Administrators"
  description = "System administrators group"
  users = [
    "/configuration/v1/end_user/1/",
    "/configuration/v1/end_user/2/"
  ]
  user_group_entity_mappings = [
    "/configuration/v1/user_group_entity_mapping/1/"
  ]
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the user group. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the user group. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `user_group_entity_mappings` (Set of String) List of user group entity mapping resource URIs associated with this group.
- `users` (Set of String) List of user resource URIs that belong to this group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the user group
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the user group


## Import

User groups can be imported using their resource ID:

```bash
terraform import pexip_infinity_user_group.example 123
```
